Product Details
TC Oil Seals

A mainstream radial shaft sealing design for rotating equipment that requires oil retention and contamination exclusion.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

TC Oil Seals

Widely used in motors, reducers, pumps, and automotive assemblies where dependable rotary sealing is essential.

CHX TC Oil Seals support reliable shaft sealing through a reinforced sealing profile designed to retain lubricant, reduce leakage, and help block dirt in rotary applications.

Rotary Shaft Sealing

Suitable for shafts in industrial drives, motors, gearboxes, and general machinery.

Leakage Control

Helps retain lubricants while preventing outside contamination from entering the housing.

Material Choice

Compound selection can be aligned with temperature range, shaft speed, and operating media.
